/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/university_system.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/university_system.dir/university_system_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/university_system.dir/Person/Person.cpp.o CMakeFiles/university_system.dir/Student/Student.cpp.o CMakeFiles/university_system.dir/Faculty/Faculty.cpp.o CMakeFiles/university_system.dir/Department/Department.cpp.o CMakeFiles/university_system.dir/Administration/Administration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/university_system.dir/Academic/AcademicAdmin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/university_system.dir/Residence/Residence.cpp.o CMakeFiles/university_system.dir/Sports/Sports.cpp.o CMakeFiles/university_system.dir/Sports/SportsAffiliation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/university_system.dir/Exam/Exam.cpp.o CMakeFiles/university_system.dir/Exam/ExamSection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/university_system.dir/Exam/ExamSchedule.cpp.o CMakeFiles/university_system.dir/Main/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/university_system.dir/Main/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/university_system.dir/Main/StudentRegistrationDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/university_system.dir/Main/StudentSearchDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/university_system.dir/Main/GenericListDialog.cpp.o -o university_system  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
